original_registry_entry.exact_document_title: WHO Guidelines for Safe Surgery 2009: Safe Surgery Saves Lives — Surgical Safety Checklist and Implementation Manual
original_registry_entry.version: WHO 2009 surgical safety checklist and implementation manual
original_registry_entry.population: Patients undergoing surgery or invasive procedures where the checklist is applied.
original_registry_entry.clinical_setting: Operating room or procedural setting before anesthesia, before incision, and before leaving the room.
original_registry_entry.applicability_note: Exact for checklist documentation of identity, site, procedure, consent, anesthesia equipment checks, pulse oximetry, allergy, airway or aspiration risk, blood loss, team communication, procedure record, counts, specimens, equipment issues, and recovery concerns. It does not replace local UAE policy.

exact_sections.heading: Before induction of anesthesia — Sign In
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports documentation of identity, site, procedure, consent, site marking, anesthesia machine and medicine check, pulse oximetry, allergy, difficult airway or aspiration risk, and anticipated blood loss.

exact_sections.heading: Before skin incision — Time Out
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports team confirmation and documented critical concerns before incision; medicine-timing items are not mapped.

exact_sections.heading: Before patient leaves operating room — Sign Out
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports documented procedure name, counts, specimen labeling, equipment problems, and key recovery or management concerns without generating a plan.

title: WHO Guidelines for Safe Surgery 2009: Safe Surgery Saves Lives — Surgical Safety Checklist and Implementation Manual
population: Patients undergoing surgery or invasive procedures where the checklist is applied.
intended_setting: Operating room or procedural setting before anesthesia, before incision, and before leaving the room.
